name: Western Union
description_short: Western Union at 5040 Beatties Ford Rd, Charlotte, NC 28216 in the Slater Road / Hamilton Circle neighborhood is open 8:00 AM – 9:00 PM daily. Call +1 704-394-1714.
description_long: This Western Union location functions as a local agent for the Western Union money transfer network. Typical services at branded agent locations include sending and receiving domestic and international wire transfers, purchasing money orders, and making bill payments. Specific services, hours, and fees vary by location — contact the store directly using the phone number above for current availability.
pros: Auto loan rates as low as 5.49% APR for new vehicles, competitive with market rates
Kasasa Cash Back Checking offers 3% cash back on debit purchases up to $400 per cycle
Certificate of Deposit rates up to 3.46% APY, above typical savings account yields
Multiple branch locations with extended Saturday drive-through hours (9am-12pm)
On-site ATMs at all branch locations for member convenience
Free online auto buying resource to help members shop for vehicles
Active community engagement with financial education, shred days, and member events
Membership-based structure means profits return to members as dividends or service improvements
cons: Service area limited to Oklahoma branches; not available for members outside the region
Membership eligibility requirements may restrict who can join compared to traditional banks
Money market account yield of 1.20% APY is modest compared to high-yield savings alternatives
Boat loan rates of 7.64% APR are higher than auto loan rates, limiting appeal for boat financing
Limited information on website regarding personal loans, home equity lines, or credit cards
best_for: Oklahoma residents and employees seeking competitive auto financing with personalized service
Local community members interested in credit repair assistance and member-focused banking
Individuals wanting cash-back rewards on debit card purchases through Kasasa checking
Vehicle buyers using free auto shopping resources to find and finance cars or trucks
diagnosis: Western Sun Federal Credit Union is best suited for Oklahoma residents seeking competitive auto financing and member-focused banking services with added rewards. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—membership and branch access are restricted to Oklahoma, making it unavailable for consumers outside the state seeking credit union services.
services: Auto loans for new and used vehicles
Kasasa Cash Back Checking accounts with 3% cash back rewards
Free auto buying resource and vehicle search tool
meta_title: Western Sun — Credit Union in Broken Arrow, OK | CreditDoc
meta_description: Western Sun — NCUA-insured credit union in Broken Arrow, OK. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
